title: The Cloud.
content:
Seest thou that cloud that rides in state,
    Part ruby-like, part candidate?
    It is no other than the bed
    Where Venus sleeps half-smothered.
meaning:
Robert Herrick's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "The Cloud."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
